statement: In every magma, Equation 193 (`x = (y * z) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 558 (`x = y * (z * (y * (y * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0983
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op y (op y x))))
